studies.title: Efficacy of the novel app-based self-help parent management training hiToco® for children with ADHD – a randomized controlled trial
studies.brief_summary: The aim of this study is to evaluate the efficacy of the digital parent management training hiToco® for families with children affected by ADHD.

studies.title: Effectiveness of app-supported behavioral parent training with the hiToco®-app for attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder and oppositional defiant disorder
studies.brief_summary: The hiToco®-app is intended to enhance conventional behavioral  parent training. The training is designed for parents of children aged 4 to 11 with a (suspected) diagnosis of attention deficit/hyperactivity disorder (ADHD) and/or oppositional defiant disorder (ODD). The app-supported parent training is supposed to reduce the ADHD or oppositional symptoms of the affected children. Furthermore, the app-supported parent training is intended to promote parental parenting skills and reduce parental stress. The aim of the study is to investigate the effectiveness of the app and its usability in the context of outpatient psychotherapeutic treatment.

studies.title: Randomised controlled pilot study on the clinical benefit of the smartphone app medigital® ADHD/OPP (powered by eyelevel)
studies.brief_summary:
The smartphone-app medigital® ADHS/OPP (powered by eyelevel) aims to support parents/caregivers of children aged 4-11 years with a (suspected) diagnosis of a hyperkinetic disorder or an attention deficit/hyperactivity disorder (ADHD), oppositional defiant disorder (ODD) and/or ADHD with a predominantly inattentive type. Through digitally guided parent training (including psychoeducation), the ADHD and oppositional symptoms, respectively, of the child should be reduced. Furthermore, the app should lead to improved parenting behaviour and reduced parental stress. The aim of the study is to examine the clinical benefit of the app. 

*Note from November 1st, 2024: After study completion, the app was renamed from  "medigital® ADHS/OPP" to "hiToco®".
